description: Style NoteGo for a look that is bold and beautiful with this handmade necklace from adrika. Its stylish design adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a look that is ethnic yet modern.Product DetailsSingle strand braided brown and beige necklace with golden coloured bead pendants, knot detail with tassel at frontMaterial and CareFabric with gold polished pendantsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of necklace: 67 cm
